title: 8 Scriptures That Tell a Man of God Who He Is
caption:
Identity is not something you manufacture. It's something you receive.

The man trying to build himself up from scratch, running on self-belief and motivation, will eventually run out of both. The man anchored in what God has already said — about who he is, what he's capable of, what he's been freed from — has a foundation that doesn't shift with how he feels on Tuesday.

These eight verses are not inspiration. They're load-bearing.

Read them slowly. One at a time. Let the one that lands sit for a while before you move on.

Save this and come back to it.

#faith #scripture #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #identity #bibleverse #christianity #wordofgod
